writes.content: After deploying to production we noticed response latency had tripled
The slowdown was caused by database queries degrading under increased user load
Added composite indexes to the database to address the bottleneck
After the index optimization, query latency dropped from 200ms to 20ms
Final root-cause summary: user growth led to database bottleneck, which was resolved by index optimization, restoring performance

query.text: Why did the latency increase and how was it resolved
